# Arghya Bhattacharjee - Portfolio & AI Agent Documentation

> Software Engineer | Full Stack Developer & MERN Specialist | B.Tech IT Graduate

## Summary
Arghya Bhattacharjee is a B.Tech Information Technology graduate specializing in Full Stack Development (MERN Stack), AI/Computer Vision solutions, and IoT integrations. He co-holds a patent for an AI-based Gas Leakage & Fire Alert System and has built multiple end-to-end full stack web applications.

## Technical Skills
- **Frontend**: React.js, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+)
- **Backend**: Node.js, Express.js, RESTful APIs, Python
- **Databases**: MongoDB, MySQL, Firebase
- **AI & IoT**: OpenCV, Computer Vision, Arduino, Raspberry Pi, ESP8266/ESP32, Sensor Systems
- **Tools**: Git, GitHub, Postman, Vercel, VS Code

## Key Projects
- **NovaCart**: Feature-rich MERN Stack E-Commerce platform with user authentication, cart management, and payment integration.
- **Little Guardian**: Smart IoT & AI-powered child safety monitoring system.
- **LPG Gas Leakage & Fire Alert System**: Patent-granted AI/IoT safety device for instant threat detection and automated alerts.
- **Face Emotion & Obstruction Recognition**: Real-time Python Computer Vision application with automated WhatsApp alerts.
